problem id: 4ef3d311
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  10011000 -> 00000100
  10111100 -> 00000101
  00011110 -> 10000000
  01000110 -> 10000010
  11011100 -> 00000110
  01101101 -> 01000011
  11111100 -> 00000111
  10100111 -> 11000101
  01100000 -> 00000011
  01000100 -> 00000010

query: 00101100
predicted answer: 00000001
